POSSIBLE TORNADO. NUMEROUS TREES AND POWERLINES KNOCKED DOWN...INITIAL INDICATIONS OF TREE DAMAGE TO BE ESTIMATED AROUND A MILE PATH NEAR THE INTERSECTION OF SKIPWOOD RD AND NEW HOPE RD. TOPS OF TREES TWISTED.

NWS STORM SURVEY HAS CONFIRMED A TORNADO NEAR THE INTERSECTION OF SKIPWOOD RD AND NEW HOPE RD. PATH WIDTH WAS APPROXIMATELY 1 1/4 MILES IN LENGTH WITH A PATH WIDTH OF APPROXIMATELY 1/4 MILE. STORM DAMAGE IN THE AREA WAS CONSISENT WITH A HIGH-END EF-0 TORNADO...WITH WINDS ESTIMATED AT 70 TO 80 MPH. NUMEROUS TREES AND POWERLINES WERE KNOCKED DOWN...MINOR SHED DAMAGE WAS INCURRED AND SEVERAL TREE TOPS WERE TWISTED.

NWS STORM SURVEY HAS CONFIRMED A TORNADO NEAR THE INTERSECTION OF SKIPWOOD RD AND NEW HOPE RD. THE EXACT DAMAGE WIDTH/PATH INFORMATION WILL BE PASSED ALONG SHORTLY. HOWEVER...STORM DAMAGE IN THE AREA WAS CONSISENT WITH A LOW-END EF-1 TORNADO...WITH WINDS ESTIMATED AT 90 MPH. NUMEROUS TREES AND POWERLINES WERE KNOCKED DOWN...AND SEVERAL TREE TOPS WERE TWISTED. MORE INFORMATION FOUND FROM THE STORM SURVEY WILL BE MADE AVAILABLE BY THIS EVENING.
